items.raw_desc: Kerékpár szerszám Unior kúpos kulcs 17, vastagság 2mm:The Unior 17 cone wrench is used for precise adjustment and assembly of bicycle hub cones, whose faces are 17 mm wide. The flat and very thin blade with a thickness of 2 mm allows safe work even in the narrow space typical of tapered bearing arrangements. High-quality hardened carbon steel with chrome finish and a comfortable vinyl handle ensure the Unior 17 cone wrench's high durability, secure grip and long tool life.                     Key features of the Unior 17 cone wrenchThe 17 mm dimension corresponds to the width of the faces of the cone or nut for which the wrench is intendedDesigned for hub cones, ideal for precision wheel bearing alignmentThin 2 mm blade allows working in confined spaces without damaging surrounding partsLength of 200 mm provides sufficient leverage and control for tightening and looseningVinyl handle ensures a comfortable and non-slip gripTwo hanging holes for practical storage of the Unior 17 cone wrench in the workshopHardened carbon steel for high strength and wear resistance
